CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (2, 'Virtuoso Testing');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (3, 'Array Test 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (4, 'Array Test 2');
SELECT tree_md5(data) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT tree_md5(ARRAY(SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id IN (2, 3))) AS md5_hash;
SELECT tree_md5(ARRAY(SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id > 0))) AS md5_hash;
SELECT tree_md5(data) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE 'Array%');
SELECT tree_md5(ARRAY(SELECT data FROM test_table)) AS full_md5_hash;
SELECT tree_md5(ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT data FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL)) AS distinct_md5_hash;
